headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Arista Networks (ANET) After Its Strong 1-Year Rally?

The stock has returned 11.0% over the last 7 days, 1.5% over the last 30 days, 31.2% year to date and 85.5% over the past year. The 3-year return is very large and the 5-year return is close to 7x.
